text:
Artemis II has officially set a new record for the farthest distance humans have traveled from Earth

Here are the top 5 human space journeys by distance

Artemis II (April 2026) – 4,06,771 km | Crew: Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, Jeremy Hansen | Reached the far side of the Moon, setting the all-time distance record

Apollo 13 (April 1970) – 4,00,171 km | Crew: James Lovell, John Jack Swigert, Fred Haise | Set the previous record using a free return trajectory after an oxygen tank explosion 

Apollo 10 (May 1969) – 3,99,194 km | Crew: Thomas Stafford, Eugene Cernan, John Young | Rehearsed lunar landing and set record for fastest human spaceflight

Apollo 8 (December 1968) – 3,77,349 km | Crew: Frank Borman, James Lovell Jr., William Anders | First human mission to leave Earth orbit and witness the Moon’s far side

Gemini XI (September 1966) – 1,374 km | Crew: Pete Conrad, Richard F Gordon Jr. | Achieved the highest Earth orbit during the early space race

From early orbit missions to deep space exploration, each step has pushed humanity further than ever before

#Artemis #Space #SMCGlobal

html: Budget ->The 50/30/20 rule is a popular budgeting framework that divides after-tax income into three categories: 50% for needs (essential living expenses), 30% for wants (discretionary spending), and 20% for savings or debt repayment.

text: 彭博社消息，渣打银行计划将旗下 Zodia Custody 的客户端托管业务收回至其企业与投资银行（CIB）的数字资产部门，最快本月宣布。重组后，Zodia 将仅作为独立的托管技术软件即服务（SaaS）平台继续运营。
html: 渣打银行于 2020 年底通过创新部门 SC Ventures 与 Northern Trust 共同成立 Zodia Custody，后续吸引 SBI Holdings、澳大利亚国民银行与 Emirates NBD 等少数股权投资者，目前在全球七个办事处拥有约 150 名员工。

post: According to Bloomberg, Standard Chartered plans to bring the client custody business of its Zodia Custody back under its Corporate and Investment Banking (CIB) digital assets division, with an announcement expected as early as this month. After the restructuring, Zodia will continue to operate solely as an independent custody technology software-as-a-service (SaaS) platform.

html: $NETX You can find all the details in this document: arxiv.org/html/2603.25100v1 Why does Anbang use such specific examples like Emirates NBD? Anbang uses real-world bank names (such as Emirates NBD or DBS Singapore) and actual regulations (such as those from the UAE or the European Union) for a very compelling technical reason: Design Validation: They want to ensure the system doesn't come across as "science fiction." By testing it "on paper" against existing banks and current laws, they demonstrate that the NetX code is equipped to handle the real-world technical challenges of global banking. Demonstration of Potential: By choosing a bank in the UAE, they are specifically showcasing that their AI agent system can manage financial jurisdictions that differ significantly from Western ones, which is one of the core strengths of their proposal.

text:
Emirates NBD (@EmiratesNBD_AE) has entered into a strategic partnership with Sobha Realty (@SobhaLtd) to provide integrated home financing solutions for buyers of off-plan residential developments across Dubai. The collaboration is designed to embed tailored mortgage solutions directly into the sales journey, giving eligible buyers earlier financial clarity, competitive lending terms, and a more efficient approval process. The initiative reflects a broader alignment between the banking and real estate sectors as Dubai continues to strengthen transparency, efficiency, and confidence in the off-plan market.

Marwan Hadi, Group Head of Retail Banking and Wealth Management at Emirates NBD, said, “Emirates NBD is delighted to be a catalyst of Dubai’s real estate sector growth by fostering a dynamic and supportive ecosystem for homebuyers.” Francis Alfred, Managing Director, of Sobha Realty, said, “Dubai real estate sector continues to attract a diverse global buyer base, and enabling a seamless and transparent homeownership journey is more important than ever.” Together, Emirates NBD and Sobha Realty are aiming to simplify documentation, accelerate approvals, and improve the overall customer experience for off-plan buyers across Dubai’s residential developments.

Read More: https://t.co/xEJFPNihAM

#DubaiRealEstate #OffPlan #EmiratesNBD #SobhaRealty

Emirates NBD (@EmiratesNBD_AE) has entered into a strategic partnership with Sobha Realty (@SobhaLtd) to provide integrated home financing solutions for buyers of off-plan residential developments across Dubai. The collaboration is designed to embed tailored mortgage solutions directly into the sales journey, giving eligible buyers earlier financial clarity, competitive lending terms, and a more efficient approval process. The initiative reflects a broader alignment between the banking and real estate sectors as Dubai continues to strengthen transparency, efficiency, and confidence in the off-plan market.

Marwan Hadi, Group Head of Retail Banking and Wealth Management at Emirates NBD, said, “Emirates NBD is delighted to be a catalyst of Dubai’s real estate sector growth by fostering a dynamic and supportive ecosystem for homebuyers.” Francis Alfred, Managing Director, of Sobha Realty, said, “Dubai real estate sector continues to attract a diverse global buyer base, and enabling a seamless and transparent homeownership journey is more important than ever.” Together, Emirates NBD and Sobha Realty are aiming to simplify documentation, accelerate approvals, and improve the overall customer experience for off-plan buyers across Dubai’s residential developments.

Read More: propertynewsint.com/en-ae/ne…

That is the most expensive mistake in the playbook.

html:
Same goes for banking.

Your corporate bank account is not tied to your freezone emirate. You can open with Mashreq, Emirates NBD, or RAKBANK no matter where your company is registered.

The bank cares about your business activity, not your freezone location.

EMAAR +11.31%
アブダビ証券取引所でも
ALDAR +11.21%

html:
UAE主要株の概要（画像掲載10社）

【ドバイ証券取引所】 
EMAAR
ドバイ最大級の総合不動産デベロッパー。
ブルジュ・ハリファ、ドバイモール、Dubai Hillsなどを開発する、ドバイ不動産の代表銘柄。

EMIRATES NBD
ドバイ最大級の銀行。
住宅ローン、法人融資、富裕層向けサービスまで幅広く、ドバイ経済全体の温度感を映す代表的銀行株。

EMAAR DEVELOPMENT
Emaarの住宅開発専門子会社。
オフプランや分譲住宅が主力で、不動産市況の勢いが最も株価に反映されやすい。

DIB（Dubai Islamic Bank）
UAE最大級のイスラム銀行。
不動産ローンや法人融資にも強く、住宅需要と連動しやすい。

SALIK
ドバイの有料道路運営会社。
人口増加・車両増加がそのまま収益増につながるインフラ銘柄。

【アブダビ証券取引所】
 ALDAR
アブダビ最大の不動産デベロッパー。
Yas IslandやSaadiyat Islandなど大型開発を手掛ける代表株。

FAB（First Abu Dhabi Bank）
UAE最大の銀行。
政府系・大型法人融資に強く、アブダビ経済を映す最重要銀行株。

ADCB
アブダビの大手商業銀行。
個人向けと法人向けのバランスが良く、国内景気に連動しやすい。

ADIB
アブダビの大手イスラム銀行。
富裕層、住宅ローン、法人融資に強い。

EAND（e& / 旧Etisalat）
UAE最大級の通信会社。
通信だけでなく、AI・Fintech・デジタル事業まで拡大しているテック系大型株。

text:
للأسف، وبعد التواصل معكم، لم يتم حل الموضوع بل تعقّد أكثر.

الموظفة التي تواصلت معي لم تكن على دراية كافية بطبيعة الشكوى، ولم تستطع التمييز بين بطاقة الاتحاد كمنتج بنكي وبرنامج الاتحاد للطيران، وهو أساس المشكلة.

تم تزويدكم بتاريخ ووقت المكالمة بدقة (28-10)، ومع ذلك تم إبلاغي بعدم وجود أي تسجيل، رغم أن موظفة سابقة أكدت أن تسجيلات المكالمات غير متوفرة بسبب خلل تقني. هذا بحد ذاته يؤكد وجود مشكلة واضحة في الأنظمة.

بالإضافة إلى ذلك:
- لا يوجد معرفة من البداية حول ما إذا تمت المعاملة عبر الهاتف أو التطبيق إلا في نهاية المكالمة  
- لا يوجد فهم لتأثير العملية على الأميال رغم أنها جوهر استخدام البطاقة  
- الوقت المستغرق لمعالجة المشكلة غير مقبول إطلاقاً  

الموضوع لم يُحل حتى الآن، بل يعكس ضعف في المتابعة، نقص في المعرفة، وغياب الشفافية في التعامل مع شكاوى العملاء.

نأمل معالجة الموضوع بشكل فعلي وجدي، وليس مجرد ردود شكلي

((((الشفافيه مطلوبه لايوجد خطة اقساط صفر فايده مقابل سحب كل النقاط)))))

post:
Unfortunately, after communicating with you, the issue has not been resolved but has become more complicated.

The employee who contacted me was not sufficiently aware of the nature of the complaint and could not distinguish between the Union card as a banking product and the Etihad Airways program, which is the core of the problem.

You were provided with the date and time of the call accurately (28-10), yet I was informed that there is no recording, even though a previous employee confirmed that call recordings are unavailable due to a technical malfunction. This in itself confirms a clear problem in the systems.

Additionally:
- There was no knowledge from the beginning about whether the transaction was made via phone or the app until the end of the call.
- There is no understanding of the impact of the process on the miles, even though it is central to using the card.
- The time taken to resolve the issue is completely unacceptable.

The matter has not been resolved yet; it reflects a lack of follow-up, a deficiency in knowledge, and a lack of transparency in handling customer complaints.

We hope the issue is addressed effectively and seriously, not just with formal responses.

((((Transparency is required; there is no zero-interest installment plan in exchange for redeeming all points))))

✔️ استرداد نقدي ومكافآت على مشترياتك
✔️ خدمة صف السيارات وخصومات حصرية على المطاعم
